title: Data processing apparatus and methods
abstract: A data processing apparatus comprising: communication circuitry configured to receive data indicative of a user and data indicative of an instruction associated with the user; and control circuitry configured: to determine whether the received data indicative of the user and data indicative of the instruction associated with the user have been generated in the absence of an explicit command from the user using previously obtained data indicative of the user and data indicative of an instruction associated with the user; if it is determined that the received data indicative of the user and data indicative of the instruction associated with the user have been generated in the absence of an explicit command from the user using previously obtained data indicative of the user and data indicative of an instruction associated with the user, to determine whether the received data indicative of the user and data indicative of the instruction associated with the user comprise a predetermined characteristic; if the received data indicative of the user and data indicative of the instruction associated with the user comprise the predetermined characteristic, to execute processing to reject the instruction associated with the user as indicated by the received data; and if the received data indicative of the user and data indicative of the instruction associated with the user do not comprise the predetermined characteristic, to execute processing to accept the instruction associated with the user as indicated by the received data.
claims:
Claims 1. A data processing apparatus comprising: communication circuitry configured to receive data indicative of a user and data indicative of an instruction associated with the user; and control circuitry configured: to determine whether the received data indicative of the user and data indicative of the instruction associated with the user have been generated in the absence of an explicit command from the user using previously obtained data indicative of the user and data indicative of an instruction associated with the user; if it is determined that the received data indicative of the user and data indicative of the instruction associated with the user have been generated in the absence of an explicit command from the user using previously obtained data indicative of the user and data indicative of an instruction associated with the user, to determine whether the received data indicative of the user and data indicative of the instruction associated with the user comprise a predetermined characteristic; if the received data indicative of the user and data indicative of the instruction associated with the user comprise the predetermined characteristic, to execute processing to reject the instruction associated with the user as indicated by the received data; and if the received data indicative of the user and data indicative of the instruction associated with the user do not comprise the predetermined characteristic, to execute processing to accept the instruction associated with the user as indicated by the received data. 2. A data processing apparatus according to claim 1 , wherein the received data indicative of the user and data indicative of the instruction associated with the user is comprised within a received electronic message, and it is determined that the received data indicative of the user and data indicative of the instruction associated with the user have been generated in the absence of an explicit command from the user using previously obtained data indicative of the user and data indicative of an instruction associated with the user when the received electronic message comprises a predetermined indicator. 3. A data processing apparatus according to claim 2, wherein the received data indicative of the user comprises details of an electronic payment card held by the user and the instruction associated with the user is an instruction for a payment of an identified amount to be made to an identified merchant using the details of the electronic payment card held by the user. 4. A data processing apparatus according to claim 3, wherein the payment is a continuous payment authority (CPA) payment and the predetermined indicator is a flag indicating that the payment is a CPA payment. 5. A data processing apparatus according to claim 3 or 4, comprising a first storage medium configured to store a first database relating the data indicative of the user and data indicative of one or more payment attributes, wherein the predetermined characteristic is that the instructed payment has a predetermined one or more of the payment attributes. 6. A data processing apparatus according to claim 5, wherein the payment attributes comprise one or more of data identifying a merchant, data identifying a constraint on an amount payable to that merchant, and data identifying a constraint on a time period during which a payment to that merchant may be made. 7. A data processing apparatus according to claim 5 or 6, wherein a record of the first database relating the data indicative of the user and data indicative of the one or more payment attributes is accessible to one or more of an issuer of the electronic payment card held by the user, a merchant identified by the data indicative of the one or more payment attributes and an electronic payment card acquirer associated with a merchant identified by the data indicative of the one or more payment attributes. 8. A data processing apparatus according to any one of claims 3 to 7, comprising a second storage medium configured to store a second database relating data indicative of each instructed payment and data indicative of whether that instructed payment was accepted or rejected. 9. A data processing apparatus according to claim 8, wherein a record of the second database relating data indicative of an instructed payment and data indicative of whether that instructed payment was accepted or rejected is accessible to one or more of an issuer of the electronic payment card used for instructing the payment, the identified merchant of the instructed payment and an electronic payment card acquirer of the identified merchant of the instructed payment. 10. A data processing apparatus according to any one of claims 3 to 9, wherein: the communication circuitry is configured to receive the data indicative of the user and the data indicative of the instructed payment from an electronic payment card acquirer associated with the identified merchant of the instructed payment; 

 the processing to reject the payment instruction comprises controlling the communication circuitry to transmit an electronic message back to the electronic payment card acquirer associated with the identified merchant of the instructed payment indicating that the instructed payment has been rejected; the processing to accept the payment instruction comprises processing the payment instruction to complete the transaction. 1 1. A method of operating a data processing apparatus, the data processing apparatus comprising communication circuitry, wherein the method comprises: controlling the communication circuitry to receive data indicative of a user and data indicative of an instruction associated with the user; determining whether the received data indicative of the user and data indicative of the instruction associated with the user have been generated in the absence of an explicit command from the user using previously obtained data indicative of the user and data indicative of an instruction associated with the user; if it is determined that the received data indicative of the user and data indicative of the instruction associated with the user have been generated in the absence of an explicit command from the user using previously obtained data indicative of the user and data indicative of an instruction associated with the user, determining whether the received data indicative of the user and data indicative of the instruction associated with the user comprise a predetermined characteristic; if the received data indicative of the user and data indicative of the instruction associated with the user comprise the predetermined characteristic, executing processing to reject the instruction associated with the user as indicated by the received data; and if the received data indicative of the user and data indicative of the instruction associated with the user do not comprise the predetermined characteristic, executing processing to accept the instruction associated with the user as indicated by the received data. 12. A program for controlling a computer to perform a method according to claim 1 1 . 13. A storage medium storing a computer program according to claim 12.
